price: Und Er hat die Ginn aus einer unruhigen Feuerflamme erschaffen.
arabic: وَخَلَقَ ٱلۡجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٖ مِّن نَّارٖ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: wakhalaqa al-jāna min mārijin min nārin
